_readme: Local overrides for Trakt → MAL ID mapping.
These take full priority over the downloaded DB.
trakt_id      — find at trakt.tv/shows/<slug> (the numeric ID in the URL, or use the API)
episode_range — optional [start, end] (inclusive). Use when one Trakt season spans
multiple MAL entries. Episodes are normalized automatically,
so ep 13 in range [13, 25] becomes ep 1 on MAL.
comment       — optional, ignored by the tool
trakt_id / mal_id only — no ranges needed.

shows.comment: Oshi no Ko S1 — Trakt S1 covers all MAL cours
Oshi no Ko S2 — same Trakt season, second cour
Oshi no Ko S3 — same Trakt season, third cour
Solo Leveling — Trakt S1 covers both MAL cours
Solo Leveling Part 2 — same Trakt season, second cour
SPY x FAMILY S1 — Trakt S1 has 25 eps (Part 1 + Part 2 combined)
SPY x FAMILY Part 2 — same Trakt S1, second cour
SPY x FAMILY Season 2 — Trakt S2 has 12 eps
SPY x FAMILY Season 3 — Trakt S3 has 13 eps
Dan Da Dan — Trakt S1 has 24 eps (both cours combined)
Dan Da Dan 2nd Season — same Trakt S1, second cour
Mushoku Tensei S1 — Trakt S1 has 23 eps (Part 1 + Part 2 combined)
Mushoku Tensei Part 2 — same Trakt S1, second cour
Mushoku Tensei II — Trakt S2 has 24 eps (both cours combined)
Mushoku Tensei II Part 2 — same Trakt S2, second cour
Re:Zero S1 — Trakt S1 includes specials (eps 26-32); cap at 25
My Dress-Up Darling — Trakt S1 has 24 eps (both cours combined)
My Dress-Up Darling Season 2 — same Trakt S1, second cour
Haruhi S1 — Trakt S1 has 28 eps (both seasons combined); first 14 eps
Haruhi S2 — same Trakt S1, second half (eps 15-28)
Attack on Titan S3 — Trakt S3 has 22 eps (Part 1 + Part 2 combined)
Attack on Titan S3 Part 2 — same Trakt S3, second half
Attack on Titan Final Season — Trakt S4 has 28 eps (Part 1 + Part 2 combined)
Attack on Titan Final Season Part 2 — same Trakt S4, second half
Rent-a-Girlfriend — Trakt S1 has all 48 eps (4 MAL seasons combined)
Rent-a-Girlfriend 2nd Season
Rent-a-Girlfriend 3rd Season
Rent-a-Girlfriend 4th Season
NieR:Automata — Trakt S1 has 24 eps (both cours combined)
NieR:Automata Part 2 — same Trakt S1, second cour
Frieren: Beyond Journey's End — Trakt S1 has 38 eps (both cours combined)
Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Season 2 — same Trakt S1, second cour
